    clone() - Method in class game.Point

    collides(Polygon) - Method in class game.Snake.Segment
     
    collidesWithShip(Ship) - Method in class game.Snake
    Checks whether any snake segment collides with the player's ship.

    G

    game - package game
     
    getPoints() - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    getPoints() - Method in class game.Ship
     
    getPoints() - Method in class game.Snake
     
    getPoints() - Method in class game.Snake.Segment
     
    getSegmentCount() - Method in class game.Snake
    Returns the current number of snake segments.
    getSegments() - Method in class game.Snake
    Returns the list of snake segments so other game logic can inspect or remove them.
    getX() - Method in class game.Point
     
    getY() - Method in class game.Point
     

    H

    height - Variable in class game.SnakeInvaders
     

    I

    isFullyDestroyed() - Method in class game.Snake
    Returns true once every segment has been removed.

    K

    keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class game.Ship
    Recognizes when keys are pressed and executes movement, shooting, and the emote (if it's not already emoting) accordingly.
    keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class game.Ship
    Recognizes when keys are released and stops movement and shooting accordingly.
    keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class game.Ship
    Required by the KeyListener interface.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class game.SnakeInvaders
    Starts the game by creating a SnakeInvaders instance and requesting its first repaint.
    move() - Method in class game.Projectile
    Moves the projectile forward according to its rotation and speed.
    move() - Method in class game.Ship
    Updates the ship's position and animation state.
    move() - Method in class game.Snake
    Moves all segments by speed in the current direction, then checks boundaries and drops + reverses when a wall is reached.

    O

    on - Variable in class game.SnakeInvaders
     
    outOfBounds - Variable in class game.Projectile
     

    P

    paint(Graphics) - Method in class game.Projectile
    Draws the projectile on the screen.
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class game.Ship
    Draws the ship on the screen.
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class game.Snake
    Draws all remaining snake segments.
    paint(Graphics) - Method in class game.SnakeInvaders
    Updates and draws the game state each frame, including the player ship, projectiles, snake, wave system, collisions, and the game over screen.
    Point - Class in game
     
    Point(double, double) - Constructor for class game.Point
     
    position - Variable in class game.Projectile
     
    position - Variable in class game.Ship
     
    position - Variable in class game.Snake
     
    position - Variable in class game.Snake.Segment
     
    Projectile - Class in game
    CLASS: Projectile DESCRIPTION: Represents a laser shot(projectile) fired by the player's ship.
    Projectile(Point, double) - Constructor for class game.Projectile
    Constructor declares the shape of the projectile, its starting position offset and its initial rotation (facing up).

    R

    reachedBottom(double) - Method in class game.Snake
    Checks if any part of the snake has touched the bottom boundary
    rotate(int) - Method in class game.Projectile
     
    rotate(int) - Method in class game.Ship
     
    rotate(int) - Method in class game.Snake
     
    rotate(int) - Method in class game.Snake.Segment
     
    rotation - Variable in class game.Projectile
     
    rotation - Variable in class game.Ship
     
    rotation - Variable in class game.Snake
     
    rotation - Variable in class game.Snake.Segment
     

    S

    Segment(Point[], Point, double, int, int) - Constructor for class game.Snake.Segment
    Creates a new snake segment.
    SEGMENT_SIZE - Static variable in class game.Snake
     
    setX(double) - Method in class game.Point
     
    setY(double) - Method in class game.Point
     
    Ship - Class in game
    CLASS: Ship DESCRIPTION: This class represents the player's ship in Snake Invaders It extends Polygon for it to be visually drawn, and implements KeyListener to process keyboard inputs.
    Ship(Point) - Constructor for class game.Ship
    Creates a new ship at the given starting position.
    shoot - Variable in class game.Ship
     
    Snake - Class in game
    CLASS: Snake DESCRIPTION: The enemy snake that moves in a Space Invaders-like pattern.
    Snake(int, double) - Constructor for class game.Snake
    Creates a snake with the given number of segments and movement speed.
    Snake.Segment - Class in game
    RUBRIC REQUIREMENT: Inner Class 2 Represents one square segment of the snake.
    SnakeInvaders - Class in game
    CLASS: SnakeInvaders Controls the main gameplay loop for Snake Invaders.
    SnakeInvaders() - Constructor for class game.SnakeInvaders
    Creates a new Snake Invaders game, initializes the ship and first snake, and registers key listeners for gameplay and restart behavior.

    U

    update(Graphics) - Method in class game.SnakeInvaders
     

    W

    width - Variable in class game.SnakeInvaders

    x - Variable in class game.Point
